post.description: Use this endpoint to retrieve the ITN(internal tracking number) of an EEI(Electronic Export Information) which was already filed with US Customs.

parameters.name: x-locale
parameters.description: This indicates the combination of language code and country code.

parameters.name: content-type
parameters.description: This is used to indicate the media type of the resource. The media type is a string sent along with the file indicating format of the file.

parameters.name: authorization
parameters.description: This indicates the authorization token for the input request

parameters.name: x-customer-transaction-id
parameters.description: This element allows you to assign a unique identifier to your transaction. This element is also returned in the reply and helps you match the request to the reply.

x-code-samples.source:
<?php

$request = new HttpRequest();
$request->setUrl('https://apis-sandbox.fedex.com/globaltrade/v1/shipments/itn/retrieve');
$request->setMethod(HTTP_METH_POST);

$request->setHeaders(array(
  'Authorization' => 'Bearer ',
  'X-locale' => 'en_US',
  'Content-Type' => 'application/json'
));

$request->setBody(input); // 'input' refers to JSON Payload

try {
  $response = $request->send();

  echo $response->getBody();
} catch (HttpException $ex) {
  echo $ex;
}

import requests

url = "https://apis-sandbox.fedex.com/globaltrade/v1/shipments/itn/retrieve"

payload = input # 'input' refers to JSON Payload
headers = {
    'Content-Type': "application/json",
    'X-locale': "en_US",
    'Authorization': "Bearer "
    }

response = requests.post(url, data=payload, headers=headers)

print(response.text)

<?php

$request->setHeaders(array(
  'Authorization' => 'Bearer ',
  'X-locale' => 'en_US',
  'Content-Type' => 'application/json'
));

$request->setBody(input); // 'input' refers to JSON Payload

try {
  $response = $request->send();

  echo $response->getBody();
} catch (HttpException $ex) {
  echo $ex;
}

import requests

url = "https://apis-sandbox.fedex.com/globaltrade/v1/regulatorycompliance/lookup"

payload = input # 'input' refers to JSON Payload
headers = {
    'Content-Type': "application/json",
    'X-locale': "en_US",
    'Authorization': "Bearer "
    }

response = requests.post(url, data=payload, headers=headers)

print(response.text)

serviceType.description:
Specify the type of service that is used to ship the package.
click here to see Service Types

totalCommodityValue.description: Specify the total commodity value. Either customsClearenceDetail or totalCommodityValue is required.

originAddress.description: Provide the shipment origin address details.

destinationAddress.description: Provide the shipment destination address details.

serviceOptionType.description: Specify attributes to filter location types. If more than one value is specified, only those locations that have all the specified attributes will be returned.

items.description:
Specify attributes to filter location types. If more than one value is specified, only those locations that have all the specified attributes will be returned.
Example: [FEDEX_ONE_RATE, SATURDAY_DELIVERY]

customsClearanceDetail.description: Specify the Customs clearance details.Either customsClearenceDetail or totalCommodityValue is required.

shipDate.description:
Specify shipment date.

Note : Default value is current date in case the date is not provided or a past date is provided.
Format [YYYY-MM-DD].
Example: 2021-08-05'

carrierCode.description:
Specify the four letter code of a FedEx operating company that meets your requirements.

Valid values are:
  • FDXE - FedEx Express
  • FDXG - FedEx Ground

    • Example: FDXE

totalWeight.description: Provide the total weight for the shipment.

includeURLReferences.description: Specify if the url references to be included in the output. These are regulatory reference data urls specific to document, agency.

consolidationType.description:
Specify the type of consolidation that contains this shipment.

Valid values are:
  • INTERNATIONAL_DISTRIBUTION_FREIGHT
  • INTERNATIONAL_ECONOMY_DISTRIBUTION
  • INTERNATIONAL_GROUND_DISTRIBUTION
  • INTERNATIONAL_PRIORITY_DISTRIBUTION
  • TRANSBORDER_DISTRIBUTION

consolidationRole.description:
Specify the role this shipment plays within the consolidation.

Valid values are:
  • CONSOLIDATION_DOCUMENTS_SHIPMENT – Shipment contains clearance documents for the corresponding consolidation.
  • CRN_SHIPMENT – Shipment is a Child Reference Number(individual shipment within consolidation).
  • MASTER_AIRWAYBILL_SHIPMENT – Shipment represents entire consolidation, moving as a unit.

FullSchema.description: The request elements to retrieve Shipment Regulatory Details.

currency.description:
This is the currency code for the amount.
Example: USD
click here to see Currency codes

countryCode.description:
Indicate the 2-character ISO country code.
Maximum length is 2.
Example: US
click here to see Country codes

postalCode.description:
This is the postal code.
Note: This is Optional for non postal-aware countries. Maximum length is 10.
Example: 65247
click here to see Postal aware countries

stateOrProvinceCode.description:
This is a placeholder for state or province code.
Example: CA.
click here to see State or Province Code

regulatoryControls.description: These are the Regulatory Controls applicable to the shipment.

importerOfRecordAccountNumber.description: The descriptive data for the importer of Record for the shipment and account number information.

documentContent.description: Defaults to COMMODITY. Only used for int'l Express requests to indicate if just documents are being shipped or not.

CustomsClearanceDetailVO.description:
These are customs clearance details.
Required for International and intra-country Shipments.

currency.description:
This is the currency code for the amount.
Example: USD
click here to see Currency codes

Money_1.description:
Specify Insurance charges if applicable.
Note: FedEx does not provide insurance of any kind.

accountNumber.description: This is FedEx Account number details. Example: 123456789

Party.description: Attributes for a Party to a transaction including the physical address, contact information and account number information.

CommercialInvoice.description:
Use this object to provide Commercial Invoice details. This element is required for electronic upload of CI data. It will serve to create/transmit an electronic Commercial Invoice through the FedEx system.
Customers are responsible for printing their own Commercial Invoice.
If you would like FedEx to generate a Commercial Invoice and transmit it to Customs for clearance purposes, you need to specify that in the ETDDetail/RequestedDocumentCopies element.
Supports maximum of 99 commodity line items.

quantity.description:
Total number of units (using quantityUnits as the unit of measure) of this commodity present in the shipment.
Example: '1'

quantityUOM.description:
This is the units quantity per commodity. This is used to estimate duties and taxes in GTC.
Example: 125

countryOfManufacture.description:
Required
Max Length is 4
Example: IN

name.description: This represents the name of commodity.

harmonizedCode.description:
This is to specify the Harmonized Tariff System (HTS) code to meet U.S. and foreign governments' customs requirements. These are mainly used to estimate the duties and taxes.
Example: 0613
To research the classification for your commodity, use the FedEx Global Trade Manager online at fedex.com/gtm. You will find country-specific information to determine whether your commodity is considered to be a document or non-document for your destination.

weight.description: Represents Weight of the packages or shipment.

units.description: Indicate the weight unit type. The package and commodity weight unit should be the same else the request will result in an error.

value.description:
This is the weight. Max. Length is 99999.
Example: 68.25

Weight.description: Indicates the weight details of the commodity.

uom.description: Unit of measure used to express the quantity of this commodity line item.

Measure.description: This object contains additional quantitative information other than weight and quantity to calculate duties and taxes.

transactionId.description: It is the unique identifier for the transaction.

customerTransactionId.description: This element allows you to assign a unique identifier to your transaction. This element is also returned in the reply and helps you match the request to the reply.

internalTrackingNumber.description: This is the ITN number from US Customs.

status.description: This is EEI’s status code for the shipment reference number.

highestSeverity.description: Specifies the type of severity of the notifications

Unique identifier used to match requests to their respective responses.
Example: XXX_ORDERXXXX789.

This includes code, message and parameter.

Indicates the description of API error alert message.
Example: We are unable to process this request. Please try again later or contact FedEx Customer Service.

CXSError_1.description: Indicates error alert when suspicious files, potential exploits and viruses found while scanning files , directories and user accounts. This includes code, message and parameter

shipDate.description: String date format to indicate the date to be used for importing. Default to next day if not present in the request. This date can’t be greater than 120 days this includes weekends. The date format should be ISO8601Date, YYYY-MM-DD.

carrierCode.description:
The shipment type abbreviation for a FedEx operating company. EX: FXE for FedEx Express.
Supported Values: FXE, FXG, FXF or any value supported in the DOM element CarrierCodeType.

originAddress.description: Represents the origin address details required for regulatory compliance

destinationAddress.description: Represents the destination address details required for regulatory compliance

serviceType.description: String value to indicate a FedEx operating company’s type of service. Valid values from the authoritative data source (ADS) are listed in the example. Default value is “IP” if not present in the request. Valid values are also DOM ServiceType values.

serviceOptionTypes.description: A list to indicate possible shipment features, some of which are listed below. (String[]) Values come from PLEFS (ADS) and DOM. Some possible valid values “FICE”, “ITAR”.

consolidationType.description:
String value to identify the type of consolidation containing this shipment.
Example: INTERNATIONAL_PRIORITY_DISTRIBUTION

consolidationRole.description:
A String value to identify the role of this shipment within the consolidation.
Example: CRN_SHIPMENT

major.description: This version is incremented when significant changes are made to the API functionality. These could be breaking changes and might require code-adjustments from clients. Accepts only numbers

minor.description: This represents a backward-compatible bug fix or minor adjustment to an existing API functionality. This is the second number in API versioning scheme. Accepts only numbers

patch.description: This represents a backward-compatible bug fix or minor adjustment to an existing API functionality. This is the third number in API versioning scheme. Accepts only numbers

countryCode.description: String value to indicate the 2-character ISO country code

stateOrProvinceCode.description: String value to identify the abbreviation for US state, Canada province etc. The valid values for stateOrProvinceCode are AS, GU, MP, PR, VI, VA

postalCode.description: String value to indicate the zip code

currency.description: This is the currency code for the amount.

commodityID.description: Unique id with the commodity in the containing shipment.

scheduleBCode.description: Is a 6 digit US customs code sent in request.

harmonizedCode.description: Is a 6 digit HS code sent in request.

name.description: String value to indicate the commodity name

exportControlClassificationNumber.description: It describes the export Control Classification Number

commodityLicenseOrPermit.description: It describes the Commodity License or Prmit

quantityUnits.description:
This the unit of measure for the units quantity. This is used to estimate duties and taxes.
Example: EA

index.description: Non negative integer value indicating the index of the commodity description.

text.description: Indicates the content of the user-instructional message in English.
text.example: Based on shipment information provided, only non-document/commodity type is permitted for this shipment

localizedText.description: This is the return message from the service provider in local language.
localizedText.example: Selon les informations fournies sur l envoi, seul le type de produit / document est autorisé pour cet envo

RegulatoryMessage.description: Object representing the information needed during the interaction with clients

value.example: Based on shipment information provided, only non-document/commodity type is permitted for this shipment

MessageParameters.description: Object containing the parameters for a Message object

MessageParameters_1.description: Object containing the parameters for a Message object

id.description: String value indicating the identifier of the message.

value.description: String value to indicate value of the message.

requiredCommodityUnitsOfMeasure.description: This is the statistical unit of measure required by the government.

items.description: Describes the regulatory data elements required to move the package.

level.description: This a Delay Level Type. The attribute of the shipment that caused delay.

commodityIndex.description: This is a non negative integer. This is a 1-based index identifying the comodity in the request that resulted in this Commodity or Document type prohibition.

RegulatoryStatement.description: Specifies the list of regulatory statements.

name.description: Specifies the name of the product being shipped.

description.description: Specifies elabaorate material description and other technical details of the product beingshipped.

localization.description:
Two letter language code.
Example: EN
click here to see Locales

localeCode.description:
Two letter region code.
Example: us
click here to see Locales

Localization.description: Specify locale details for composing email with the document.

RegulatoryCountryAdvisory.description: Specifies the types and parameters of Country's advisory regulations.

code.description: Specifies the advisory document related code.

text.description: Specifies names of the regulatory advisories.

parameters.description: Specifies information related to the advisories and their relevant parameters.

localizedText.description: This provides the specifics of the regulations.

message.description: Specifies the API alert message.

status.description: This is EEI’s status code for the shipment reference number.

highestSeverity.description: Specifies the type of severity of the notifications

The account number value.
Max Length is 9.

Format [YYYY-MM-DD].

portOfExportCode.description: The code for the port of export for the export-import combination

shipmentReferenceNumber.description: This is the shipment reference number which will be returned in the response, this field is mandatory when doing an update or cancellation of an EEI filing.

hazardousMaterial.description: This indicates if this shipment contains hazardous materials

customerReferenceNumber.description: Customer reference number, this is supplied by the customer

trackingNumber.description: This is the AWB if it is available by the customer.

partiesToTransactionAreRelated.description: This indicates if the companies are related like a parent company

firstName.description: Identifies the contact person's name suffix.

lastName.description: Identifies the contact person's name suffix.

FullSchema_FileEEIInputVO_eeiContactAndA.description: String value to indicate the name of the person. personName and companyName cannot be null or empty string at the same time.

companyName.description: Identifies the company this contact is associated with.

phoneNumber.description: String value to indicate the phone number. Minimum length is 10 and supports maximum of 15 for certain countries using longer phone numbers.

eMailAddress.description: String value to indicate the email address. Maximum length is 80.

streetLines.description: Array of   string values to indicate the address lines, including combination of number, street name etc

stateOrProvinceCode.description:
String value to identify the abbreviation for US state, Canada province etc. The valid values for stateOrProvinceCode are AS, GU,MP, PR, VI, VA
click here to see State or Province Code

postalCode.description: The postal zip code for the destination

countryCode.description:
Specifies the country code.
click here to see Country codes

ultimateConsigneeType.description: Indicates the type of ultimate consignee receiving the goods.

einTaxId.description: This is the tax EIN number code for the USPPI.

currency.description: This is the currency code for the amount.

commodityId.description: A number that identifies the specific commodity line item within a shipment.

description.description: A commercial description of the commodity reported for the line item.
description.example: REGISTERS, ACCOUNT BOOKS, NOTEBOOKS, ORDER BOOKS, RECEIPT BOOKS, LETTER PADS, MEMORANDUM PADS,   DIARIES AND SIMILAR ARTICLES [REGISTERS, ACCOUNT BOOKS, NOTE BOOKS, ORDER BOOKS, RECEIPT BOOKS, LETTER PADS, MEMORANDUM PAD  S, DIARIES AND SIMILAR ARTICLES, EXERCISE BOOKS, BLOTTING-PADS, BINDERS (LOOSELEAF OR OTHER)]

quantity.description: Total number of units that correspond to the unit

quantityUnits.description: A unit of measure code that corresponds to the quantity as prescribed by the Schedule B/HTS number reported.

exportLicenseNumber.description: This is the export license number for the shipment.

currency.description: This is the currency code for the amount.

exportControlClassificationNumber.description: It describes the export Control Classification Number

licenseCode.description: Code defining whether the shipment completes the terms of the license, or the shipment is only a partial delivery relative to the license terms.

ddtcITARExemptionNumber.description: The specific citation (exemption number) under the International Traffic in Arms Regulations (ITAR) from the Code of Federal register (see 22 CFR 120-130) that exempts the shipment from the requirements for a license or other written authorization from DDTC.

ddtcRegistrationNumber.description: The registration identifier assigned by the DDTC to the registered manufacturer or exporter that has authorization from the DDTC (through a license or exemption) to export the article.

ddtcSignificantMilitarySMEIndicator.description: An indication that the articles reported warrant special export controls because of their capacity for substantial military utility of capability

ddtcEligibleParty.description: A self-certification by the exporter for the exemption, and a self-certification by the exporter that they are an eligible party

usmlCategoryCode.description: Classified Articles, Technical Data and Defense Service Not Otherwise Listed

FullSchema_FileEEIInputVO_ddtcDetail.description: If you choose licenseCode of S00, SCA, SGB or SAU you need to supply DDTC information.

scheduleBCode.description: Is a 6 digit US customs code sent in request.

exportInformationCode.description: US govt contract for overseas construction

usDomestic.description: An indication if the manufacture origin of the commodity is US Domestic or not.

content-type.name: content-type
content-type.description: This is used to indicate the media type of the resource. The media type is a string sent along with the file indicating format of the file.
